user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add new class change approvers for a location, so that employee class changes are routed to the right approvers
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Class Change Approvers screen; When I click Add new class change approvers and select a location and approvers; Then the approver configuration is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new offer approver, so that offer-related approvals are directed to the correct role
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Class Change Approvers screen; When I click Add new offer approver and select the approver; Then the offer approver is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view class change approvers by location, so that I can confirm the approval mapping
acceptance_criteria: Given approver configurations exist; When I open the list; Then each row shows the Location and its Approvers

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing class change approver mapping, so that I can update approvers when roles change
acceptance_criteria: Given an approver mapping is listed; When I click Edit and change the approvers; Then the updated mapping is saved
